name: Silver-nDPI
help:
Silver-nDPI: Deep Packet Inspection via XDP→AF_XDP→nDPI.

Requires: kernel >= 5.15, root/CAP_BPF, AF_XDP support.
nDPI is statically linked — no runtime dependencies on target.

Commands:
  silver-ndpi start             Start nDPI engine + XSK redirect
  silver-ndpi stop              Stop nDPI engine, detach XSK
  silver-ndpi flows             Dump classified flows with L7 protocol
  silver-ndpi stats             Show engine statistics
  silver-ndpi config ports P    Set DPI redirect ports (comma-separated)
  silver-ndpi config rate N     Set sampling rate for non-port traffic
  silver-ndpi version           Show version info
